title: feat: restore direct remote Supabase DB connectivity and remove GLM 5.1 model
head: Repcoders:main
body: This Pull Request restores direct remote Supabase database connectivity by reverting the client-side local storage mocking, fixes route-guard authentication, implements brand logo contrast inversion for light themes, integrates dynamic clock-based greetings, and removes the GLM 5.1 model option.
